result.summary: Splunk exposes documented HTTP APIs for Splunk Enterprise, Splunk Observability Cloud, and AppInspect, plus public CLIs for AppInspect and the Packaging Toolkit; Splunk also publishes an MCP server app for Splunk Platform.
result.description: Splunk provides software for collecting, searching, monitoring, and analyzing machine data across security, IT operations, and observability use cases. Its products include Splunk Enterprise, Splunk Cloud Platform, and Splunk Observability Cloud.

splunk_basic_account.label: Splunk account username/password
splunk_basic_account.setup: Use your Splunk account credentials to call [the Splunk login endpoint](https://api.splunk.com/2.0/rest/login/splunk) with HTTP Basic authentication, as documented in [Splunk AppInspect API endpoint reference](https://dev.splunk.com/enterprise/reference/appinspect/appinspectapiepref). This is the documented way to obtain an AppInspect JWT.

splunk_appinspect_jwt.label: Splunk AppInspect JWT bearer token
splunk_appinspect_jwt.setup: Request a JWT from [the Splunk login endpoint](https://api.splunk.com/2.0/rest/login/splunk) using your Splunk account username/password via HTTP Basic auth, as described in [Splunk AppInspect API endpoint reference](https://dev.splunk.com/enterprise/reference/appinspect/appinspectapiepref). The response JSON contains the token in `data.token`; send it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` to AppInspect.

splunk_observability_token.label: Splunk Observability Cloud organization access token or session token
splunk_observability_token.setup: Create or obtain either an organization access token with API permission or a session token in Splunk Observability Cloud. The API reference repeatedly states these are required, for example on [Charts](https://dev.splunk.com/observability/reference/api/charts/latest/) and [Client Inventory](https://dev.splunk.com/observability/reference/api/client_inventory/latest/). Use the product UI/docs linked from the Observability developer reference to manage org tokens and session tokens.

surfaces.name: Splunk Observability Cloud REST APIs
surfaces.notes: The reference lists many Observability APIs under one developer surface. Most pages show base URL `https://api.{REALM}.observability.splunkcloud.com/v2`, while some newer specs such as Client Inventory document a different base path `/fm-service/v1` on a variable host.

surfaces.name: Splunk MCP Server for Splunk Platform
